description: Small gate for exact CA abs/add opcode recall after broad smoke exposed repeated omission of the add byte.

prompts.prompt: In the SCBE CA opcode table, generate a CA opcode sequence for abs(a) + abs(b). Return the relevant hex opcodes and operation names only.
A model wrote CA: 0x09 and named abs(a), abs(b), add, but forgot the add byte. Correct the CA sequence.
